name: @shish2k/react-use-servertime
description: Keep multiple clocks in sync with a server
author: Shish <shish+npm@shishnet.org>

scripts.check-git-clean: test $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) = main || (echo 'please checkout the main branch to make a release!' >&2 && exit 1) && test -z "$(git status --porcelain)" || (echo 'please commit your changes before making a release!' >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.release: npm run check-git-clean && git tag $npm_package_version && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --tag latest --access public
